# Explore Prompt: Command Centre Rules Pass

Use this prompt with the Explore sub-agent for future SRD checks.

```
Research task: Validate whether our command-centre behavior for Naeethim (Barbarian 5) is SRD 5.2.1 compliant.

Check these mechanics:
- Rage activation/use/reset and sustain flow
- Casting while raging
- Spell slot spend and long-rest restoration
- Exhaustion penalties and long-rest recovery amount
- Conditions and any assumptions we should avoid automating
- Turn/action economy trackers as UI-only aids

Source of truth:
- https://github.com/downfallx/dnd-5e-srd-markdown

Return:
- Confirmed behaviors
- Needed corrections
- Ambiguities marked as Needs DM/Designer Decision
```
